0122212112002010001111022010 - ASI: 20

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  002 = 00 * 2
  010 = 01 * 0
  012 = 01 * 2
  110 = 11 * 0
  211 = 2 * 11
  221 = 22 * 1
  0011 = 00 * 11
  2002 = 2 * 002
  22010 = 22 * 010
  012221 = 012 * 221
  0100011 = 010 * 0011
  2112002 = 211 * 2002
  11022010 = 110 * 22010
  0122212112002 = 012221 * 2112002
  010001111022010 = 0100011 * 11022010
  0122212112002010001111022010 = 0122212112002 * 010001111022010
